setupInstructions.message: Run the following commands to install required testing packages:
setupInstructions.alternativeMethod: Add the PackageReference elements to your .csproj file and run 'dotnet restore'

fileReports.summary: Added comprehensive tests for UnitTest1 class, covering method invocation and constructor initialization
fileReports.recommendations: Consider adding meaningful logic to Test1() method to improve testability
fileReports.note: Current implementation is minimal and lacks specific business logic

fileReports.summary: Generated comprehensive test suite for ProducerWrapper with 8 test cases covering constructor validation, message production, error handling, and disposal scenarios
recommendations: Consider adding dependency injection support for easier testing
Implement more robust error handling and logging
Add integration tests with actual Kafka broker for more comprehensive coverage
fileReports.note: Tests use localhost:9092 as a placeholder Kafka broker. Replace with actual configuration in real-world scenarios.

fileReports.summary: Generated comprehensive test suite for ConsumerWrapper with 8 test cases covering constructor validation, message reading scenarios, exception handling, and disposal behavior.
recommendations: Consider adding more granular error logging in readMessage method
Implement a more robust error handling strategy for consume exceptions
Add optional timeout configuration for readMessage method
fileReports.note: Tests use Moq for mocking Kafka consumer dependencies and FluentAssertions for readable assertions.

fileReports.summary: Generated comprehensive unit tests for OrderRequest model covering all properties, constructors, and enum status values with 100% code coverage
recommendations: Consider adding data validation attributes for id, productname, and quantity
Implement custom validation logic for quantity and productname
Add XML documentation comments to clarify property constraints
keyImprovements: Full coverage of OrderRequest model properties
Tested edge cases like null and negative values
fileReports.note: Tests assume no strict validation rules exist in the current model implementation

fileReports.summary: Generated comprehensive test suite for OrderController covering happy path, model validation, serialization, constructor initialization, and null input scenarios
recommendations: Add logging to capture more detailed error scenarios
Consider adding more robust input validation
fileReports.note: Tests require ProducerWrapper and OrderRequest to be properly defined in the project
